## Summary
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/useSvelteRequireEachKey`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**information**](/reference/diagnostics#information).
- This rule belongs to the following domains:
  - [`svelte`](/linter/domains#svelte)
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`svelte/require-each-key`](https://sveltejs.github.io/eslint-plugin-svelte/rules/require-each-key/)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"useSvelteRequireEachKey": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Require keyed `{#each}` blocks in Svelte templates.

Svelte uses keyed each blocks to track list items across updates. Without a key, Svelte
updates items by position, which can cause state to move between items when the list changes.

For more information, see the Svelte documentation on [keyed each blocks](https://svelte.dev/docs/svelte/each#Keyed-each-blocks).

## Examples

### Invalid

```svelte
{#each items as item}
  <div>{item}</div>
{/each}
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text"></code></pre>

### Valid

```svelte
{#each items as item (item.id)}
  <div>{item}</div>
{/each}
```
